channel.title: Design Patterns on
channel.description: Recent content in Design Patterns on

item.title: Design Principles and Design Patterns
item.description: Design principles and design patterns are related but serve different purposes. Design principles are high-level guidelines for designing software that helps developers create code that is maintainable, extensible, and adaptable. These principles are not specific to any programming language or technology and can be applied to any software development project. Design principles provide a foundation for good software design and help developers create code that is easier to maintain and change over time.
